body.title: [triage] Audit resolve() consumers for model-less HUMAN_TERMINAL decisions
body.intention: I intend that no resolve() consumer crashes on a model-less RoutingDecision, so the guru human-terminal path is safe for any future caller, not just today's live path that cannot reach it.
body.description:
FOLLOW-UP from T-inference-tier-ladder-real. resolve() can now return rules_engine.HUMAN_TERMINAL — a truthy RoutingDecision with source=None/model=None (the guru human terminal). Today this is contained: the live device._route path maps task_class->tier and maxes at 'master', so guru never reaches resolve() live (verified). But any FUTURE caller doing `if decision: decision.model.model_id` crashes on it (AttributeError on None.model_id) — a latent landmine. This surfaced in the sweep test (test_escalation_leaves_the_local_box), which had to add an `is not None` guard on d.model.

Proposed shape: pick ONE of — (a) make HUMAN_TERMINAL falsy (__bool__ -> False) so `if decision:` correctly routes it to the no-model branch while `decision is HUMAN_TERMINAL` / `.is_human_terminal` gives the explicit signal; OR (b) audit every resolve() consumer and add explicit model-less handling; OR (c) fold into T-inference-typed-no-path-result's typed-result model (HUMAN_TERMINAL becomes a typed variant alongside NoCapableModel/NoAvailableProvider). Option (c) is likely the cleanest since that sibling ticket is already introducing typed no-path results.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/rules_engine.py (HUMAN_TERMINAL definition + RoutingDecision.__bool__ if option a), device.py (dispatch consumer at ~line 568), any other resolve() consumer. tests/inference/.
**Design rules:** homogeneity-over-special-case (one model-less contract, not per-consumer patches). Coordinate with T-inference-typed-no-path-result (overlapping surface).
**Scope boundary:** IN — making the model-less resolve() outcome safe for all consumers. OUT — the tier ladder itself (done); the typed NoCapableModel/NoAvailableProvider split (sibling ticket, though this may fold into it).
**Test plan:** a consumer-contract test: every resolve() consumer path handles a HUMAN_TERMINAL/model-less decision without AttributeError. If option (a): a test that `bool(HUMAN_TERMINAL) is False` and `if decision:` skips it.
**Proof obligation:** a hollow build cannot pass a test that feeds a model-less decision through the live dispatch path and asserts no crash + correct human-handoff branch.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
**Completion criteria:** a chosen model-less contract (falsy sentinel, audited consumers, or typed variant) is in place; a consumer-contract test proves the live dispatch path handles a HUMAN_TERMINAL/model-less decision without AttributeError and takes the human-handoff branch; no resolve() consumer does unguarded decision.model access.
